description.description: A brief explanation of what the CloudFront origin access control does or represents.

etag.description: The ETag is a unique identifier for the current version of the origin access control configuration.

name.description: The name assigned to the CloudFront origin access control.

origin_access_control_origin_type.description: Specifies the type of origin that the access control is associated with.

signing_behavior.description: Defines how requests are signed when accessing the origin.

signing_protocol.description: Indicates the protocol used for signing requests to the origin.
